title: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool
text: interactive R/Shiny application processing, validating, reporting phytoplankton data Imaging FlowCytobot (IFCB) instruments. Developed Swedish marine monitoring SMHI. AlgAware-IFCB integrates IFCB Dashboard automated data retrieval, provides interactive image gallery reviewing correcting AI classifier predictions, generates Word reports phytoplankton group composition maps, image-count maps, chlorophyll maps, heatmaps, image mosaics, CTD fluorescence profiles. Intended use: application developed internal use SMHI part Swedish national marine monitoring programme. may adapted use institutes operating IFCB instruments, though configuration data infrastructure need adjusted accordingly.

what: Pie chart map with displacement and leader lines — create_pie_map
title: Pie chart map with displacement and leader lines — create_pie_map
text: Draws pie chart station map. pies overlap crowded regions, pies displaced asymmetrically away true station coordinates leader line + anchor dot drawn viewer can still tell pie belongs station. Works grouping (phytoplankton groups, zooplankton orders, microbial phyla, …) numeric value (biomass, biovolume, abundance, …).

title: Pie chart map with displacement and leader lines — create_pie_map
code: create_pie_map(   data,   station_col = "station_name",   lon_col = "sample_longitude_dd",   lat_col = "sample_latitude_dd",   group_col = "group",   value_col = "value",   label_col = station_col,   group_levels = NULL,   group_colors = NULL,   group_labels = NULL,   radius = 0.28,   size_by = NULL,   size_range = c(0.15, 0.4),   repel = TRUE,   min_sep = 2.4,   min_disp = 1.6,   show_labels = TRUE,   label_size = 3,   pie_border_color = "white",   pie_border_width = 0.3,   leader_color = "gray20",   leader_width = 0.5,   anchor_color = "gray10",   anchor_fill = "white",   anchor_size = 1.8,   basemap = NULL,   basemap_scale = "medium",   basemap_fill = "gray95",   basemap_border = "gray70",   sea_color = "aliceblue",   xlim = NULL,   ylim = NULL,   pad = 1,   title = NULL,   legend_title = "Group" )

title: Pie chart map with displacement and leader lines — create_pie_map
text: data long-format data.frame one row per (station, group). Required columns configurable *_col arguments default station, lon, lat, group, value. station_col, lon_col, lat_col, group_col, value_col Column names data. Defaults match SHARK conventions: "station_name", "sample_longitude_dd", "sample_latitude_dd", "group", "value". label_col Column use -map station label. Defaults station_col. Set NULL (show_labels = FALSE) omit labels entirely. group_levels Optional character vector controlling legend slice ordering. Groups present data dropped. group_colors Optional named character vector colours, keyed group name. NULL, ggplot's default discrete palette used. group_labels Optional named character vector legend labels, keyed group name. Labels may include HTML markup. radius Pie radius latitude degrees. Default 0.28. size_by Optional. NULL (default) draws pies radius. "total" scales pie's radius square root station's total value. character value interpreted name numeric column wide-format station table; pass scale external metric (e.g. chlorophyll). Scaled pie sizes relative within current plot ; size legend drawn. size_range Numeric length-2: minimum maximum radius (latitude degrees) size_by set. Default c(0.15, 0.40). repel Logical. Run displacement algorithm? Default TRUE. min_sep Minimum centre--centre separation two pies, expressed multiple larger two radii. Default 2.40. min_disp Minimum displacement pie moved , multiple radius. Default 1.60; values \(>1\) guarantee anchor sits outside displaced pie. show_labels Logical. Draw station labels next pie? Default TRUE. label_size ggplot text size station labels. Default 3. pie_border_color, pie_border_width Aesthetics slice borders. Defaults: "white", 0.3. leader_color, leader_width Aesthetics leader segments drawn anchor displaced pie edge. Defaults: "gray20", 0.5. anchor_color, anchor_fill, anchor_size Aesthetics dot drawn true station location displaced pie. Defaults: "gray10", "white", 1.8. basemap Optional ggplot layer (list layers) used base map. NULL, coastline polygon rnaturalearth drawn. basemap_scale Resolution passed rnaturalearth::ne_countries() basemap NULL. One "small", "medium" "large". basemap_fill, basemap_border, sea_color Colours default coastline basemap. xlim, ylim Optional numeric length-2 vectors. supplied override auto-fitted map extent. pad Padding (degrees) added around station bounds auto-fitting extent. Default 1.0. title, legend_title Optional plot title legend title. legend defaults "Group".

title: Pie chart map with displacement and leader lines — create_pie_map
text: ggplot object.

title: Pie chart map with displacement and leader lines — create_pie_map
code: # 1. Minimal example: 5 made-up stations on the Swedish west coast #    with three plankton groups. Note the two close stations (S1, S2) #    that will get displaced. # Standard SHARK column names used by default (with "Other" group) df <- data.frame(   station_name        = rep(c("S1", "S2", "S3", "S4", "S5"), each = 4),   sample_longitude_dd = rep(c(11.4, 11.6, 12.5, 14.0, 18.0), each = 4),   sample_latitude_dd  = rep(c(58.0, 58.1, 56.6, 55.5, 57.5), each = 4),   group = rep(c("Diatoms", "Dinoflagellates", "Cyanobacteria", "Other"), 5),   value = c(50, 30, 15, 5,  10, 60, 25, 5,  60, 25, 10, 5,             20, 50, 25, 5,  35, 35, 25, 5) ) create_pie_map(df, radius = 0.25)   # \donttest{ # 2. Custom colours, ordered legend, custom title create_pie_map(   df,   group_levels = c("Diatoms", "Dinoflagellates", "Cyanobacteria", "Other"),   group_colors = c(Diatoms = "#1f77b4",                    Dinoflagellates = "#d62728",                    Cyanobacteria = "#2ca02c",                    Other = "#7f7f7f"),   title = "Plankton composition",   legend_title = "Taxon group" )   # 3. Pie size proportional to total value at each station. #    Sizes are relative within the figure; no size legend is shown. df_variable <- data.frame(   station_name        = rep(c("S1", "S2", "S3", "S4", "S5"), each = 4),   sample_longitude_dd = rep(c(11.4, 11.6, 12.5, 14.0, 18.0), each = 4),   sample_latitude_dd  = rep(c(58.0, 58.1, 56.6, 55.5, 57.5), each = 4),   group = rep(c("Diatoms", "Dinoflagellates", "Cyanobacteria", "Other"), 5),   value = c(50, 30, 15, 5,  70, 50, 20, 10,  30, 20, 20, 10,             100, 80, 50, 20,  20, 15, 20, 5) ) create_pie_map(df_variable, size_by = "total", size_range = c(0.15, 0.45))   # 4. Non-SHARK column names (e.g. zooplankton abundance dataset) zoo <- data.frame(   site_id   = rep(c("A", "B", "C"), each = 4),   longitude = rep(c(12, 16, 20), each = 4),   latitude  = rep(c(56, 58, 57), each = 4),   order     = rep(c("Calanoida", "Cyclopoida", "Cladocera", "Other"), 3),   counts    = c(120, 80, 40, 20,  60, 100, 30, 10,  90, 70, 50, 25) ) create_pie_map(   zoo,   station_col  = "site_id",   lon_col      = "longitude",   lat_col      = "latitude",   group_col    = "order",   value_col    = "counts",   legend_title = "Order" )   # 5. Disable displacement (pies will overlap if crowded) create_pie_map(df, repel = FALSE)  # }

title: Generate the AlgAware Word report — generate_report
text: output_path Path output .docx file. station_summary Aggregated station data. baltic_wide Wide-format Baltic summary. westcoast_wide Wide-format West Coast summary. baltic_mosaics Named list mosaic images (Baltic). westcoast_mosaics Named list mosaic images (West Coast). taxa_lookup Optional taxa lookup table HAB column. cruise_info Character string cruise/date information title. classifier_name Optional character string classifier model name used automated classification. use_llm Logical; TRUE LLM API key configured (OPENAI_API_KEY GEMINI_API_KEY), generate report text using LLM. Default FALSE uses placeholder text. annotator Character string analyst name introduction statement. image_counts Optional data frame fetch_image_counts() cruise-wide image counts coordinates track map. total_bio_images Optional integer; total number biological images used report (excluding non-biological classes). llm_model Optional character string; name LLM model used text generation (e.g. "gpt-4.1"). n_station_samples Optional integer; total number IFCB samples matched AlgAware stations. llm_provider Optional character string; LLM provider use ("openai" "gemini"). NULL auto-detects. on_llm_progress Optional callback function called LLM request arguments (step, total, detail) progress reporting. frontpage_baltic_mosaic Optional magick image front page Baltic Sea mosaic. NULL (together West Coast), front page generated. frontpage_westcoast_mosaic Optional magick image front page West Coast mosaic. unclassified_fractions Optional named list data frame unclassified proportion estimates passed LLM prompts context. frontpage_baltic_taxa Optional character vector taxa names matching numbered images Baltic mosaic (captions). frontpage_westcoast_taxa Optional character vector taxa names matching numbered images West Coast mosaic. report_number Optional report issue number (e.g. "1"). report_dnr Optional diarienummer string front page (e.g. "2026-1234"). ctd_data Optional CTD profile data read_cnv_folder() (AlgAware-matched, used chlorophyll map). ctd_data_full Optional full CTD profile data read_cnv_folder_all() (standard stations, used CTD section regional fluorescence profiles time series). lims_data Optional LIMS discrete Chl-data read_lims_data() (AlgAware-matched, used chlorophyll map). lims_data_full Optional LIMS data read_lims_data_all() (standard stations, used CTD section time series). chl_stats Optional historical statistics load_chl_statistics(). chl_map_source Character; active chlorophyll map source: "ferrybox", "ctd", "lims" (bottle, 0-20 m), "lims_hose" (hose integrated, 0-10 m). phyto_groups Optional data frame columns name, AphiaID, phyto_group (typically SHARK4R::assign_phytoplankton_group()). Used render per-station phytoplankton group composition pie map. NULL, assignments computed demand via SHARK4R available.

Geometry computed isotropic coordinate system \((lon \cdot \cos(\bar{lat}), lat)\) visual distance coord_sf map corresponds approximately Euclidean distance .

True (anchor) coordinates read lon/lat. map_xlim, map_ylim Numeric length-2 vectors bounding pie centre. min_sep Minimum centre--centre separation two pies, expressed multiple larger two radii. Default 2.40 leaves small visible gap touching pies. min_disp Minimum displacement pie moved , expressed multiple radius. Default 1.60 guarantees anchor sits clearly outside displaced pie.

text: Interactive Shiny app (launch_app()) end--end IFCB cruise reporting. Sidebar workflow: Settings → Data → Validate → Report. Loading overlay smooth fade-first render.

title: algaware 0.1.0
text: Downloads IFCB samples IFCB Dashboard instance selected cruise date range. Automatic spatial matching IFCB samples AlgAware monitoring stations using configurable bin radius. Merges FerryBox chlorophyll fluorescence locally configured data folder. Processes HDF5 classification files together feature files biovolumes carbon estimates using iRfcb. SQLite annotation database (ClassiPyR-compatible schema) exporting validated image annotations training data.

title: algaware 0.1.0
text: Gallery tab browsing IFCB images organised class. Per-image per-class relabelling (reassign class global class list custom class) invalidation. Custom class creation full scientific name, AphiaID, HAB flag, italic formatting metadata. Corrections log importable future sessions replay relabellings automatically.

title: algaware 0.1.0
text: Table view samples exclusion/re-inclusion controls. Excluded samples removed summaries, maps, mosaics, report.

title: algaware 0.1.0
text: Interactive mosaic builder Baltic Sea West Coast images. Binary-search layout algorithm maximise image size within canvas bounds (rectpacker). Per-taxon image re-rolling configurable image count per mosaic.

title: algaware 0.1.0
text: Station maps: image count, phytoplankton group composition pie chart (Diatoms, Dinoflagellates, Cyanobacteria, Cryptophytes, Mesodinium spp., Silicoflagellates, ), chlorophyll maps. Cyanobacteria pie slice colour: teal-cyan (#14B8A6). Image count map legend: “Images (counts/L)”; width matched chlorophyll map y-axes align Word report. Chlorophyll source selector: FerryBox, CTD fluorescence, LIMS bottle (0–20 m), LIMS hose-integrated (0–10 m). Regional heatmaps stacked bar charts Baltic Sea West Coast. Summary DT table per-station taxa biovolume data.

title: algaware 0.1.0
text: Fluorescence depth profiles per station CNV files (oce). Regional Chl-time-series 1991–2020 climatological mean ± SD ribbon. Automatic station name synonym resolution via station_mapper.txt.

title: algaware 0.1.0
text: Front page logo, diarienummer, phytoplankton group composition pie map, report number. Swedish summary (Sammanfattning) English summary (Abstract). Cruise metadata table. Image mosaic overview numbered captions italic species formatting. Image count map, chlorophyll map, heatmaps, stacked bar charts. Per-station sections image mosaics. CTD fluorescence profiles Chl-time-series. Species names italicised Word output; HAB taxa marked red bold asterisk.

title: algaware 0.1.0
text: Optional AI-generated report text via OpenAI (OPENAI_API_KEY) Google Gemini (GEMINI_API_KEY). Generates Swedish summary, English summary, individual station descriptions guided configurable writing guide (inst/extdata/report_writing_guide.md). HAB taxa deterministically marked * regardless LLM output. Default OpenAI model: gpt-5.1. Override via OPENAI_MODEL environment variable. Retry HTTP 429 (rate-limited) 503 (service overload) exponential back-120 s. Bloom alert instructions appended prompts conditions met: spring bloom (West Coast, Jan–Feb, diatoms > 50 % biovolume station, chl > 3 µg/L) cyanobacterial bloom (Baltic, Jun–Aug, cyanobacteria > 50 % biovolume station, chl > 3 µg/L).
